allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\({k:v for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'anthropic' in k.lower\(\)}\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', list\(p.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(node -e "const A = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); console.log\(typeof A, typeof A.default, typeof A.Anthropic\)")
